add dir field to EdgeAppender, add AppendEdgeIfAbsent for idempotent replay
add atomicCommitHook test hook, ExecuteSplitAtomic, appendSplitGraphEdges helper, RecoverSplitCommits
add TestSplitAtomicCommit with crash-injection subtests + helpers

downstream_consumers: engine/split (Orchestrator.AdmitWrite reads catalog Status; unaffected signature-wise)
engine/catalog (RecoverFromWAL unaffected; new record type skipped by its switch already via existing skip-unowned convention)
engine/graph (ReadAll used internally by AppendEdgeIfAbsent; no external API removed)

GitHub issue #12 (not closed by this agent per invariant; verification/closeout is a later step)
risk_rationale: Capstone atomic-commit path for the entire split feature; correctness bugs here can corrupt catalog/btree/graph consistency. Mitigated via crash-point test coverage and idempotent replay design.
